title: Prevent V3Unknown from running with flat XML output
body: This patch updates the main `process` function to prevent the V3Unknown pass from being run when generating flat XML output. The problem with this pass and flat XML is that it adds shared `__Vlvbound` nodes for temporary variables, and introduces false dependencies in the connectivity of the netlist. This pass should have been omitted with the original patch to add flattening, but I overlooked it. See this original issue https://www.veripool.org/boards/3/topics/2619 for more details.
